{{Infobox event
| name = Seven-Year Festival
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Seven-Year Festival Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Seven-Year [[Festival]] is a recurring event held by the various clans within [[Sacred Valley]]. It serves as a significant opportunity for different clans to demonstrate their strength and compete against one another. During the festival, rival groups often attempt to gain advantages through rigged trade deals or questionable bets. The hosting responsibilities rotate among the clans; for instance, while the [[Wei clan]] hosted a previous iteration, the [[Kazan clan]] was expected to host the following one. However, due to changes in clan status, such as the [[Wei clan]] gaining a [[Grand Elder]], hosting duties may be adjusted. Preparation for the event is extensive, involving outside craftsmen who spend months improving a host clan's infrastructure by building booths, repairing roads, and decorating buildings to ensure they are well-presented for the influx of guests from across the valley. The festival includes various competitions and demonstrations, such as combat matches in an [[arena]], which can provide valuable experience for participants.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The Seven-Year [[Festival]] serves as a grand occasion for the clans of [[Sacred Valley]] to compete against one another and demonstrate their collective power. During this year's festivities, the [[Wei clan]] acted as the host for the gathering. Once guests have settled into the event, several important activities take place within a dedicated [[arena]]. [[Kelsa]] participates in this festival by fighting as a representative of her family.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Seven-Year Festival]] is an event where [[Kelsa]] will fight.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Kelsa]] represents her family in the [[Festival]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Seven-Year Festival]] is an event where clans show their power.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Wei clan]] hosted the [[Seven-Year Festival]] this year.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Seven-Year Festival]] is a time when the clans of [[Sacred Valley]] compete against one another.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c8">''Unsouled'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Seven-Year Festival]] includes important events that take place once guests have settled in.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Seven-Year Festival]] features an [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Seven-Year Festival]] was an event where the [[Kazan]] and [[Li]] clans marched through the main thoroughfare.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The last [[Seven-Year Festival]] was fought in an [[arena]] that the [[Titan]] kicked aside.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Seven-Year Festival]] is happening next year.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Seven-Year Festival]] is an event hosted by clans.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“We’ll show the other clans our power at the Seven-Year Festival,” Lindon said, angling the conversation around to his point.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Gesha asked me to work on the welcoming display for the Seven-Year Festival next year,” Seisha said.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
